results.title: Travis Scott Debuted Unreleased Nike Waffle Shoe At ‘The Odyssey” Premiere
results.description: Travis Scott wore an unreleased Nike Moon Shoe collaboration to the red carpet premiere of The Odyssey film. The post Travis Scott Debuted Unreleased Nike Waffle Shoe At ‘The Odyssey” Premiere appeared first on HotNewHipHop .
